findings.description: External behavioral guidelines (Karpathy) used as systematic audit lens for agent prompts, surfacing 4 categories of missing behavior
findings.proposedRule: Audit against external guidelines for prompt refinement

findings.description: Plan explicitly audited existing agent rules before writing new sections, preventing 3 near-duplicates
findings.proposedRule: Audit existing rules before adding new ones

findings.description: Wiring gate found pre-existing inconsistencies (executor description, tester structure) when analyzing all agents
Inline behavioral rules in agent prompts rather than shared protocol — agents don't dynamically load protocols
findings.proposedRule: Agent behavior belongs in agent prompts, not protocols
